[Rei]

>Be me
>14F, Middle school student
>Meet a nice guy, start falling head over heels
>Other girl gets jealous, get bullied
>Get your hair cut off and now you look like an army veteran
>Try grow it out, they cut it off again
>Nice guy helps you, you feel elated
>Ask him out, he declines saying "I'd rather date a dead rat than your un-fuckable face."
>Die inside, skip school, repeat grade
>Never talk to anyone again
